sources.paper_doctor_bimaristan_scientific_paper: Evidence Stage 3 protocol spec (B=15, 30 external blind solvers, B0-B6 baselines, decision_loss, anti-degeneracy)
sources.doctor/adversarial/midweather_fingerprin: 7 freeze validators (validate_seval_freeze_tie, validate_axis_provenance, validate_baseline_config, validate_decision_spec, validate_probe_index, validate_observation_budget, validate_freeze_artifact)
minimal_repo_with_freeze example (canonical freeze JSON shape used by 39 protocol tests)

field_provenance.freeze_id: inferred-from-source-code-pattern (certified_manifest.s_eval_id = 'fingerprint_lc322_clean_001') -- REQUIRES HUMAN INPUT for canonical value
field_provenance.created_at: paper is dated 2026-05; freeze dated 2026-05-22 (matches minimal_repo_with_freeze example placeholder pattern). NOTE: not a paper-claimed date -- reconstruction choice consistent with the example's placeholder shape.
field_provenance.protocol_commit: paper:608 -- 'all pass at commit 6ca6c28' (cited freeze anchor; commit does not exist in current git history)
field_provenance.frozen_files: ALL 8 SHA256s computed. probe_index JSON SHA256 = fc4065bee0f48a9f8b8133423f3f96e597ac79baaac20de0d5cbe06f8f221785. S_eval manifest SHA256 = 8e86990fb582bc817d9a992eca0e6acc921a26eea2e20d4e36eec5dd23f1342b. S_eval schema SHA256 = 5e16abe9e33e089ada19fa01cafc04a70438f487bb4727f217cb9822dd9d70ec. result JSON SHA256 = 1400828193bbd51795d3ad454d5b1ec32991a8505b2ae94bf91323ef783c1f2d. test_midweather_fingerprint.py SHA256 = e612009bc830c86148eac1674b7e7a6fdffd58c69ce2dd7d4d724ae28e0de130. run_midweather_fingerprint_lc322.py SHA256 = b06d0bc424f76293c855ad5e53178c85052993cbb355d03c6f988ccdbb352048. midweather_fingerprint_features.py SHA256 = 87cc7bb18527a34d27e8fc2da65812cd045e1416484af55ea34517f67690e2a0. self-SHA for MIDWEATHER_FINGERPRINT_GATE_FREEZE.json = PENDING_SELF_REFERENCE_AT_FREEZE_TIME (frozen-file self-reference is exempt from the SHAs-required check by convention; the validator accepts the placeholder).
field_provenance.primary_utility: inferred-from-example + paper:115 (decision_loss named in Stage 3 spec)
field_provenance.observation_budget.observed_probe_ids: PATCHED FROM data/midweather_fingerprint_lc322_probe_index.json -- 15 probe IDs at even positions (0,2,4,...,28) in axis-declaration order. Construction rule documented in probe_index JSON.
field_provenance.observation_budget.target_probe_ids: PATCHED FROM data/midweather_fingerprint_lc322_probe_index.json -- 15 probe IDs at odd positions (1,3,5,...,29) in axis-declaration order.
field_provenance.weakest_baseline_config.random_seed: inferred-from-example (322001 = 'LC322' + 001 placeholder) -- no paper source; REQUIRES HUMAN INPUT for canonical value
field_provenance.weakest_baseline_config.predeclared: inferred-from-example -- paper implies (B6 must be predeclared to avoid leakage)
field_provenance.decision_spec.*: source-code ACCEPT_REJECT_SPEC constant (lines 392-406); failure_threshold=0.05 and minimum_accept_rate=0.2 confirmed by paper:575
field_provenance.success_rule: inferred-from-example + paper:596 -- 'strict improvement on primary utility (decision_loss). Ties are FAIL.'
field_provenance.split_configuration.O_obs: PATCHED: mirrors observation_budget.observed_probe_ids (required by minimal_repo_with_freeze convention).

observation_budget.unit: one solver execution on one probe_id

decision_spec.name: ACCEPT_REJECT
decision_spec.policy_input: K observations from O_obs including fingerprint_context
decision_spec.policy_output: one action from action_space per solver
decision_spec.utility_function: Minimize cost-weighted decision_loss = wrong_accept_cost * wrong_accepts + wrong_reject_cost * wrong_rejects.
decision_spec.success_rule: C must have strictly lower decision_loss than every same-information baseline (B0-B6), satisfy minimum_accept_rate, and not be degenerate.

success_rule: C must strictly beat every same-observation baseline (B0-B6) on decision_loss. Ties are FAIL.
